statement: In every magma, Equation 139 (`x = y * ((z * y) * y)`) implies Equation 1775 (`x = (y * z) * ((y * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0791
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op y x) w))
